name: Popcorn Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the popped corn, cheese goldfish crackers, bread croutons, and tiny pretzels.
2. Add 2 tablespoons of butter and 1 teaspoon of Worcestershire sauce to the mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. Sprinkle garlic powder, onion powder, and chili powder over the popcorn mixture. Toss gently to evenly distribute the seasonings.
4. Spread the seasoned popcorn mixture out on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper or aluminum foil.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until the popcorn is lightly toasted and golden brown.
6. Allow the popcorn to cool in the oven for about 10 minutes before transferring it to an airtight container.
7. Store the cooled popcorn mixture in the container until ready to serve.
Note: The recipe makes approximately 11 cups of seasoned popcorn mix.
